mentions.note: Tennessee regional bank with 50% rally from lows; strong Q4 with controlled expenses and growing revenues; Southeast data center boom (XAI), refinance activity, and M&A consolidation tailwinds.

Regional Southeast bank crushing fundamentals: 3¢ EPS beat, strong NII growth (+6%), ROTCE +200bp to 15%+. South's economic tailwinds, OBBB capex boost, Middle East calm all supporting capex cycle. Still great bank to own.
